_comment: Thinking / reasoning controls per model family. Add a new entry to expose a control in the chat options sheet for any model whose id matches one of the `match` regexes (case-insensitive, tested against the model id). The first matching profile wins, so put more specific patterns before broader ones. Each option's `value` is sent verbatim under `params[paramName]` in the /api/chat/completions request body — Open WebUI then routes it to the upstream provider (Ollama `think`, OpenAI `reasoning_effort`, etc.). `defaultValue` is the value the UI starts at before the user picks anything for this model — once they pick a value it's persisted in modelPreferencesStore and overrides this default on subsequent conversations.
